name: Dreadful Delivery
short_description: In the dead of night, when the streets are quiet and the neighborhood sleeps, you’re on the clock, delivering packages no one else dares to touch. Each delivery is a race against time—and against the dangers lurking in the shadows. But the job pays well… if you can survive the night.
detailed_description:
In the dead of night, when the streets are quiet and the neighborhood sleeps, you’re on the clock, delivering packages no one else dares to touch. Each delivery has a chance to be your last. But the job pays well… if you can survive the night.

Spot your enemies before they strike but be careful not to let your paranoia take over. In this slice of the demo, The more you imagine threats, the harder it becomes to see what's real.

Key Features:

Survive chilling encounters with the stalker.

Paranoia builds when you fail to spot your stalker causing hallucinations.

Deliver packages on time to clients while being pursued.

Experience atmospheric horror with tense gameplay.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese
